MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Thomas Karabin is present.
Attorney, Steven Lau, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Timothy Briggs, is present.
Attorney, Hope Greenhill , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept.207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of MAR-29-2010 is vacated.
